page_content:
BUDT757 Cybersecurity (2 Credits)

Distributed technologies and the ability of business to capture increasing amounts of sensitive data have increases the stakes and risks for information security. The focus of this course will be to help students understand cybersecurity frameworks, analytic techniques and enterprise risk management.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith School of Business.
